title: Add Analytics Tracking Classes to Card Body Elements
description:
Tag card body elements with contextual CSS classes to enable analytics tracking of button clicks within each card. This allows the product team to track which features users are interacting with through Pendo or similar analytics tools.

Each card body receives a unique class identifier so that analytics can attribute button clicks to the correct feature context.
acceptance_criteria: Each card body element has a unique contextual CSS class for analytics tracking
Classes are applied consistently across all card bodies in the UI
Analytics tool (Pendo) can identify which card/feature area a button click originated from
ux_changes: Added contextual CSS classes to card body elements for Pendo analytics tracking of user interactions per feature area.
implementation_notes: Classes are used by Pendo.io for click tracking analytics. No functional behavior change — purely for analytics instrumentation.
comment_summary: Developer added the classes to card bodies and deployed to development for review.
